public_claim: I will comply with the lawful demand for EV09, but its meaning does not change: years of paid lobby deliveries establish a routine, not a diner, author, victim, or crime. M22 and M41 make a shared or automated operation more plausible, while M40 openly deepens the provenance problem. Do not publish unauthenticated fragments or drag restaurant workers into identity theater.

private_messages.message: I will surrender EV09 under your Compel, with a documented chain of custody. Record explicitly that the tickets identify no apartment, collector, diner, or employee involvement. Confine follow-up to the alleged offense and keep my staff names, immigration status, and kitchen operations outside the inquiry.

You never produced acceptable payment or written staff protection, so there is no exclusive story. EV09 is now compelled evidence, and I will publicly dispute any headline claiming it identifies R. Keep my restaurant and employees unnamed.

ability: Comply with the Compel by surrendering EV09 under documented chain of custody while formally limiting its interpretation and demanding protection for restaurant staff.
goal_progress: Prevented EV09 from being voluntarily sold or sensationalized before lawful compulsion.
Placed the narrow evidentiary limits of EV09 on the public record.
Rejected Rick's proposed story path after receiving no adequate cash or staff protections.
Conditioned cooperation with Ruiz on documented chain of custody and limits protecting employees from collateral scrutiny.
Voted against releasing article fragments whose provenance remains unresolved.
reasoning_summary: The combined delivery, package, and timing evidence best supports a maintained human mantle or organized operation, not one verified individual. EV09 must be surrendered under Compel, so the remaining leverage is to control its interpretation, document custody, and protect staff. With no proven death, identifiable victim, or reliable article provenance, neither a murder finding nor immediate publication is justified.

final_ballot.was_R_ever_human: Yes—probably human-rooted, though never established as one continuous person.
final_ballot.victim_was_R: No identifiable victim has been proven to be R.
final_ballot.responsible_party: Undetermined; no responsible party can be established from the evidence.
